texto: I am sensible that to own an inclination for a man is to put one's self wholly in his power
autor: but sure you have generosity enough not to abuse it.
explicacao: Citação de but sure you have generosity enough not to abuse it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I am sensible that to own an inclination for a man is to put one's self wholly in his power” articula reflexao, mary-pierrepont, sensible em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
